{{Quote|…one of my most talented advisers...|High Prefect Yoog Skell|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref>}}
'''Fal Tivvik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Intendant caste|Intendant]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], and one-time advisor to [[High Prefect]] [[Yoog Skell]]. Following complications during her [[Escalation]] process, however, she became a [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]].

==Biography==
Fal Tivvik was a member of the [[Intendant caste]], those Yuuzhan Vong who oversaw the administration and the bureaucracy of the [[Species/Legends|species]]. When she was still young, Tivvik became an adviser to a superior intendant, [[High Prefect]] [[Yoog Skell]], and proved herself in his service as one of his most talented protégés, to the extent that she was marked for [[Escalation]]. During the [[escalation]] ceremony, however, the [[Shaper caste|shaper]] in charge of the process, [[Ch'Gang Hool]]—later responsible during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] for the terraforming of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]—was suspected by High Prefect Skell of having made errors in the Escalation process. Tivvik's implants were rejected and she became [[Shamed Ones|Shamed]], and Yoog Skell's suspicions of [[Master Shaper]] Ch'Gang Hool's talents never truly abated.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1stm}}
